summary: The user is planning a dinner party and seeks assistance with the menu, specifically looking for popular Korean BBQ dishes that can be made in large quantities. They express interest in incorporating Indian and Middle Eastern dishes, asking for suggestions and tips for making falafel crispy and fluffy, as well as exploring various Korean noodle dishes. The user shares their recent experiences at different Korean restaurants, highlighting unique dishes they enjoyed.
facts: The user is planning a dinner party and is looking for menu suggestions.
The user is interested in serving a variety of dishes from different cuisines, including Korean BBQ, Indian, and Middle Eastern options.
The user is considering making falafel as one of the Middle Eastern options for their dinner party.
The user has tried three different Korean restaurants recently, each with unique flavors and styles.
The user enjoyed an amazing bibimbap at one Korean restaurant.
The user tried a really spicy kimchi stew at another Korean restaurant.
The user experienced a unique take on Japchae with sweet potato noodles at a third Korean restaurant.
The user has been experimenting with different types of noodles lately.
